item.title: Sugar Foods LLC: Kroger HOMESTYLE Cheese AND Garlic CROUTONS NET WT 5 OZ (141g) Recall
item.product: Kroger HOMESTYLE Cheese AND Garlic CROUTONS NET WT 5 OZ (141g)
item.summary: Possible Salmonella in croutons. The firm was notified by their supplier that the non-fat milk powder used to manufacture the product was recalled due to possible salmonella. Product details: Kroger HOMESTYLE Cheese AND Garlic CROUTONS NET WT 5 OZ (141g) UPC 0 11110 81353 4 DISTRIBUTED BY THE KROGER CO., CINCINNATI, OHIO 45202
item.affectedPeople: Product was shipped to distribution centers in the following states: IN, TN & WI.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
